description: Tier 3 Korean/Chinese services batch test results

results.details: Page loaded fully with complete UI (AI 뤼튼 branding, chat input, tabs for 채팅/AI 탐지방어/유튜브 요약/실시간 녹음). APF did NOT block page load. Login not required for basic chat. Prompt submission not attempted due to time constraints - but page is functional.
CLOVA X service permanently shut down as of 2026-04-09. Page shows '서비스 종료 안내' (Service Termination Notice). Cannot test - service no longer exists.
Same as clova - CLOVA X terminated 2026-04-09. Both clova and clova_x entries point to same shutdown page.

notes: wrtn.ai loads fine (not blocked), CLOVA X shut down yesterday. Recommend removing clova/clova_x from APF registration.
